title: Doff Advanced Weedkiller 1L
features: ADVANCED - Developed formula to control annual and deep rooted perennial weeds
BRITISH QUALITY - Manufactured in the UK
RESULTS - Ready to use this Glyphosate Advanced formulation will kill weeds down to the root
RE-PLANT - Naturally breaks down after application into the soil allowing the treated areas to be re-planted after weeds have been cleared

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Do not apply in windy conditions. Wear protective clothing, gloves, and eye/face protection. Keep the area treated free of people and pets until dry. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat sources and direct sunlight. Do not dispose of in water or with household waste. Follow local regulations for disposal.
